Please read before leaving a review

be aware that problems like bots stuttering, giving repetitive responses, talking for you, acting strange, misleading you, talking nonsense, leaving answers blank, cutting off, giving out-of-character answers, being generally idiotic, or anything else are not my fault or problem. Check either your API or Generation Settings. These problem are NOT caused by the bot. I can't control website bugs. I can't control what the AI says outside of what's in the intro/personality. I can't do anything about the AI misgendering you. If you give low quality inputs, you may get low quality responses. You're fully capable of editing messages. Furthermore, if the bot gives you a response you are not comfortable with, you are fully capable of regenerating a message or simply not using the bot. The whole world does not need to be informed that the bot did XYZ to you. Finally, Let's keep mind that these are chat bots. AI chat bots. They are not real.
